name: totally-integrated-claude
description: Siemens TIA Portal engineering automation for Codex. Provides routed skills for Python TIA Scripting and C# Openness API (project lifecycle, PLC, HMI, devices, networks, drives, import/export, Add-Ins), plus an LSP server for Siemens PLC languages (SCL, STL, UDT, DB, AWL).

interface.shortDescription: Siemens TIA Portal skills, MCP, and PLC language support.
interface.longDescription: Siemens TIA Portal engineering automation with routed skills for Python TIA Scripting and C# Openness API workflows, plus TIA Portal MCP and Siemens PLC language server configuration.
defaultPrompt: Use the TIA roadmap skill to plan a PLC automation task.
Inspect a TIA Portal Openness workflow for C# or Python.
Draft an import/export workflow for PLC or HMI assets.
